topic_definition: Markers indicating the senior-engineer archetype of orchestrating work — both classical task decomposition, architecture, and specification authorship, and the emerging practice of directing AI/agent systems through context engineering, agent harnesses, repository instructions, memory, and multi-agent coordination.
